message:
test: add integration test suites for allocation elision, dark matter saturation, hardware code layout, and workload transfer prior gates

New integration test suites (4 files):
- allocation_elision_gate_integration.rs: tests for allocation elision
  optimization verification — GC pressure invariance, finalizer ordering
  preservation, and observable semantics equivalence
- dark_matter_saturation_gate_integration.rs: tests for unexplained
  performance variance threshold enforcement and saturation metric
  computation
- hardware_code_layout_gate_integration.rs: tests for instruction cache
  behavior validation, branch prediction profile conformance, and
  hardware target matching
- workload_transfer_prior_integration.rs: tests for statistical prior
  computation, cross-context weight transfer, and deployment context
  similarity scoring

Also:
- Fix trace_fusion_integration.rs: minor test assertion update
- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with gate module test coverage statuses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
